creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 185572
patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates devel/visualparadigm to the latest release build 20170802.

Some highlights from the announcement[1]:

* Business Planning with BMM Guide-Through Process
* Manage Product Backlog with Flexible Story Map Structures
* Identify SPIKE in Affinity Estimation
* Estimate User Stories with CONFIGURED Affinity Table
...

[1] https://news.visual-paradigm.com/display.php?M=49545&C=4880721f0ae26a655241844fde360702&S=180&L=2&N=53

-QA:
 * portlint -AC: OK
 * poudriere builds for {10.3,11.0,11.1}{i386,amd64}: OK
